llm_connection_slug.description: Slug of the central LLM Connection to use (Settings > LLM Connections). Blank = the active default connection.

json_retry_max.description: Maximum JSON-repair retries when the model returns invalid JSON

prompts_dir.description: Optional override of the asset-storage prompts directory

image_enabled.description: Enable prompt-to-image generation (Replicate / Black Forest FLUX)

replicate_api_token.description: Replicate API token for image generation (server-side only)
